working_on: Issue #132 — replace monolithic engine/ENGINE_LOG.md with per-session changelog directory pattern adopted from the Engine reference template.
declared_scope: Issue #132 closeout via adoption of the Engine reference's per-session changelog pattern: author ADR 0092 (supersedes the ENGINE_LOG-naming clauses of ADR 0037) with the ADR 0084 extraction step; create engine/changelog/<YYYY>/<S-NNNN>-<slug>.md directory + engine/schemas/changelog-entry.schema.json + full aggregator (changelog_aggregate.py) with 15 pytests; rewire validate.py (remove engine_log_format; add check_changelog_entries + check_changelog_readme_governance + 10 pytests); perform Issue #132 Part 1 retroactive duplication audit (10-session sample) + author 0.1.0 release synthesis at engine/changelog/2026/0.1.0-foundation-close-S-0198.md + move historical engine/ENGINE_LOG.md to engine/changelog/_history/ENGINE_LOG-pre-0.1.0.md + transitional stub; rewire shutdown-sequence step 7 in Layer-1 doc + SKILL.md lockstep; cascade-update 22 inbound prose references across CLAUDE.md, STATE.md, ROADMAP.md, README.md, HANDOFF.md, 6 ops docs, 5 ADRs; create engine-v0.1.0 git tag. phase: NA-engine-apparatus
